sourcePrompt: An AH-1G Cobra attack helicopter, about thirteen meters long but barely a meter wide across the fuselage - a flying blade parked on skinny skids. A tandem cockpit steps up from the gunner in front to the pilot behind under a long glass canopy, a rounded chin turret with a minigun hangs under the nose, and short stub wings carry rocket pods on each side. The slim tail boom carries a swept fin and tail rotor, and a two-bladed main rotor spans wider than the aircraft is long. Dark olive, sleek and predatory.
handEdit: Math.PI radian rotations converted to intended degrees (createPart rotation is degrees); offline rebake, no model call
